regions.name: Pax Nexus — The Custodian Neutral Zone
regions.description: A sovereign neutral territory administered directly by the Galactic Custodians and the Aegis Monetary Authority. All factions are welcome; no faction holds authority here. Home to the AMA Exchange Hub, the Conclave Hall, and The Common Market.

nodes.name: Pax Nexus — Central Hub
nodes.lore: The beating heart of interstellar commerce and diplomacy. The Aegis Monetary Authority operates the grand AMA Exchange Hub here, while Custodian Arbiters hear disputes from across the seven factions. No weapon may be drawn within Pax Nexus city limits — Sentinel Guards enforce this with lethal efficiency.
